ablations.description: Raw scenario replay with scoped lexical retrieval.
ablations.name: Raw-only no extraction

ablations.description: Add activation scoring over graph neighborhoods.
ablations.name: + graph activation

ablations.description: Use valid-at filtering for current and historical facts.
ablations.name: + temporal validity

ablations.description: Suppress stale or contradicted active answers.
ablations.name: + contradiction suppression

ablations.description: Rerank retrieved evidence before budget assembly.
ablations.name: + evidence reranking

ablations.description: Update utility scores from feedback and traces.
ablations.name: + utility learning

ablations.description: Include user-managed core memory blocks and summaries.
ablations.name: + summaries/core memory

ablations.description: Propagate forget operations through derived memories.
ablations.name: + forgetting propagation

ablations.description: All deterministic retrieval, consolidation, and verification stages enabled.
ablations.name: Full Quipu

baselines.description: Replay all eligible raw context within the answer budget.
baselines.name: Full context

baselines.description: Use the most recent scoped messages only.
baselines.name: Recent only

baselines.description: Lexical search baseline over scoped raw messages.
baselines.name: BM25

baselines.description: Vector-only retrieval over scoped raw messages.
baselines.name: Vector RAG

baselines.description: Answer from generated summaries without raw evidence retrieval.
baselines.name: Summary only

baselines.description: Use memory cards without raw-message fallback.
baselines.name: Memory cards only

baselines.description: Use graph expansion without lexical/vector ranking.
baselines.name: Graph only

baselines.description: Zig core runtime over in-memory storage.
baselines.name: Core in-memory

baselines.description: Zig core runtime over LatticeDB when configured.
baselines.name: Core LatticeDB

publishedComparisons.notes: Managed Mem0 platform result; top-200 retrieval cutoff.
Managed Mem0 platform result; top-50 retrieval cutoff.
